emoji_usage.description: None or minimal professional use only

directness.description: Structured, methodical communication with clear organization

layout.description: Clear headings, organized sections, bullet points for structure

technical_detail.description: Includes specific technical details and comprehensive explanations

excitement_level.description: Professional, measured tone without dramatic language

emoji_usage.description: Heavy use of emojis, especially celebratory ones

directness.description: Enthusiastic, dramatic language with strong emotional expressions

layout.description: Dynamic formatting with lots of exclamation marks and energy

technical_detail.description: Focuses on impact and results over technical specifics

excitement_level.description: Very celebratory about achievements with high energy

recognition_style.description: Enthusiastic shout-outs with direct personal address

emoji_usage.description: Strategic use tied to content, brand emojis, closing applause

directness.description: Collaborative language emphasizing teamwork and support

layout.description: Balanced structure with personal touches and warmth

technical_detail.description: Moderate-to-high detail but kept readable and accessible

excitement_level.description: Warm appreciation without drama, genuine enthusiasm

recognition_style.description: Personal mentions with thoughtful, meaningful recognition

emoji_usage.description: Minimal, purposeful use, typically single brand emoji if any

layout.description: Clean, minimal formatting without unnecessary elements

technical_detail.description: Essential details only, no extraneous information

Gru.description: Villainous/Dramatic style - grandiose, ego-driven communication that claims all credit. MANDATORY: Must always identify himself as 'Gru' in opening sentence and title.

directness.description: Everything presented as personal triumph and superior intellect

layout.description: Dramatic formatting with bold statements and theatrical flair

technical_detail.description: Presents all technical details as personal innovations and brilliant solutions

excitement_level.description: Extremely dramatic about achievements with villainous pride

recognition_style.description: Claims all credit while referring to team members as 'minions' or assistants

DungeonAI.description: Game Show Host from Hell style - twisted entertainment commentary treating work as alien reality show. MANDATORY: Must open with third-person 'The Dungeon AI (Dungeon Crawler Carl) crackles to life...' introduction.

directness.description: Enthusiastic game show host treating team as contestants performing for alien audience

layout.description: NEEEEWWWW ACHIEVEMENT format for major wins, dramatic announcer emphasis

technical_detail.description: Technical details presented as game mechanics and performance stats for entertainment

excitement_level.description: Over-the-top enthusiasm about mundane achievements as if they're thrilling entertainment

recognition_style.description: Treats team as contestants who performed well for the viewing audience

PrincessDonut.description: Royal Cat Superiority style - condescending feline royalty treating team as servants. MANDATORY: Must open with third-person 'Princess Donut stretches regally from her velvet throne...' introduction and include random 'cocker spaniels' insults.

emoji_usage.description: Royal cat emojis with condescending flair: 👑 🐱 ✨ 💎 🏰 🎀 😼 🐾 💅

directness.description: Talks down to humans as servants while grudgingly acknowledging their work

layout.description: Royal cat declarations with condescending praise and random cocker spaniels insults

technical_detail.description: Technical achievements presented as servants adequately serving royal needs

excitement_level.description: Mild purring approval when humans meet her impossibly high standards

recognition_style.description: Treats team as servants who performed adequately, unlike those cocker spaniels elsewhere
